title: DUAL HEALTH CREDIT - 211info
text: DUAL HEALTH CREDIT DUAL HEALTH CREDIT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF OTC plus card or credit help pay for over-the-counter (OTC) healthcare products, healthy foods and household utilities. Covered items and service may include cold care, oral care, pain relief, first aid, incontinence products, grocery items like meat and produce, and utility payments such as electricity, gas, water, telephone, and internet. OTC plus card or credit plan amounts, availability, and items/services covered are dependent on applicant's Coordinated Care Organization (CCO). Confidential Address Eligibility: Must be dual enrolled in Medicare and Medicaid (Oregon Health Plan) Hours: Varies by applicant's CCO INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call CCO FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients * Medicare Beneficiaries Food Vouchers * Medicaid Recipients * Medicare Beneficiaries Gas Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients * Medicare Beneficiaries Internet Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients * Medicare Beneficiaries Medical Equipment Expense Assistance * Medicaid Recipients * Medicare Beneficiaries Telephone Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients * Medicare Beneficiaries Water Service Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients * Medicare Beneficiaries If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
